name: Cannabis Bioscience International Holdings, Inc.
summary: PART I . History Overview The Company was formed in Colorado on February 28, 2003, as a limited liability company under the name Fidelity Aircraft Partners LLC. On December 16, 2009, it converted to a corporation under the name Fidelity Aviation Corporation, and on August 24, 2004, it changed its name to China Infrastructure Construction Corp. On February 28, 2018, the Company changed its name to Hippocrates Direct Healthcare, Inc., and on December 6, 2022, it changed its corporate name to Canna...
